name: The Vitality AU.
description:
💉 “This virus will only get worse and worse from here. Good luck and stay away from the infected.” 💉

Woooooo another zombie apocalypse AU but this time it’s more scary!?!? Woohoo! Anyways have fun surviving in this dystopian apocalypse.

Series made by @StickTheMan on YouTube!!! 🥳

UPD LOG 1 - ADDED SOME STUDENTS AND MISS BLOOMIE.

—-—————————————————————————

Danger Level System -

0 - Perfectly Fine! (Survivable)

1 - Cautious (Somewhat Survivable)

2 - Threatening (Slim Survival Chance)

3 - Slightly Dangerous (Very Slim Survival Chance)

4 - Dangerous (Life Threatening Threat.)

5 - Lethal (You’re fucked if you get this.)
creator: St4rRebuilder
